name: NitroBoost 46%
description: Premium Urea fertilizer with 46% nitrogen for rapid and vigorous plant growth.
usage_instructions: Apply 50kg per acre during the vegetative growth stage. Ensure soil is moist before application.
safety_instructions: Wear gloves when handling. Store in a cool, dry place. Harmful if swallowed.

name: PestGuard Pro
description: Broad-spectrum insecticide effective against aphids, caterpillars, and whiteflies.
usage_instructions: Mix 2ml per liter of water. Spray uniformly over foliage early morning or late evening.
safety_instructions: Toxic to bees. Do not apply when bees are active. Wear protective mask during spray.

name: WeedClear Xtreme
description: Non-selective systemic herbicide for absolute control of annual and perennial weeds.
usage_instructions: Dilute 10ml in 1 liter of water. Direct spray on target weeds avoiding desirable plants.
safety_instructions: Avoid drift to nearby crops. Wash hands thoroughly after use.

name: FungiStop Plus
description: Preventative and curative fungicide for control of blights, mildews, and rusts.
usage_instructions: Apply 2.5g per liter of water at the first sign of disease. Repeat after 14 days if needed.
safety_instructions: Keep away from waterways as it may be toxic to aquatic life.

name: YieldMax Seeds (Corn)
description: High-yielding, drought-tolerant hybrid corn seeds treated for early pest resistance.
usage_instructions: Sow at a depth of 2 inches with 8-inch spacing between plants in rows 30 inches apart.
safety_instructions: Seeds are treated with fungicides. Do not use for food, feed, or oil purposes.

name: Pro-Grow Activator
description: Stimulates root development, flowering, and fruit setting for maximum harvest.
usage_instructions: Foliar spray: 1ml per liter during flowering stage and early fruit development.
safety_instructions: Handle with care. Avoid contact with eyes and skin.
